subject: A male-presenting fighter with dark spiky hair wearing a gi, performing a dramatic kick while golden crackling energy emanates from their feet and legs in a wide action composition.
suspected_ip: Son Goku (or alternate user, likely Goku given context) — Dragon Ball franchise
description: A fighter is caught mid-kick in a full-body wide composition. The figure has dark spiky hair and wears a gi. The defining visual element is golden crackling energy emanating from the feet and lower legs — consistent with the card name 'Feet Kamehameha,' a technique where Kamehameha energy is channeled through the feet rather than the hands. The figure's body is largely horizontal, mid-air, with one leg extended in a powerful kick. The background shows swirling yellow-gold energy. The technique shown here does not feature the traditional hand-cupped pose of a standard Kamehameha, which matches the novel foot-based variant.
foreground: Fighter in dark-haired gi, mid-kick, golden energy blazing from feet and legs
emotion: Explosive commitment — full body thrown into the kick, no restraint
